test.query: SELECT largestTriangleThreeBuckets(10)(EventTime, ResolutionWidth) FROM hits_10m_single GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 17
SELECT largestTriangleThreeBuckets(100)(EventTime, ResolutionWidth) FROM hits_10m_single GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 18
SELECT largestTriangleThreeBuckets(1000)(EventTime, ResolutionWidth) FROM hits_10m_single GROUP BY CounterID ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 17
